action.reasoning: Observation: Training succeeded but stopped at only 24 iterations - very early. valid l2=0.995 means little signal extracted. Analysis: Need to verify pipeline works end-to-end first. Let me submit eval to get baseline, measure time. Decision: submit eval now.
